author: codex
scope: Current validate unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape rows after wave34 checkpoint.
mutation_mechanism: Retire malformed accepted submissions in data/submission-overrides/retired.json and append corrected accepted submissions to data/submissions/2026-06-23_codex_relation_cleanup_batch228.jsonl; no generated canonical JSONL hand edits.

decisions.reason: The malformed relations used has_metric from agency entity to source. The same source already has per-agency metric_claim records for recovery and operating ratios, so batch228 replaces each aggregate entity->source relation with six entity->metric_claim relations.
The malformed implemented_by relation pointed project->project. Batch228 adds a local MTA entity observation for the same source and replaces it with project->entity implemented_by.

verification.json_parse: jq empty data/submission-overrides/retired.json and per-line jq over batch228 journal: ok
